# Project Status / Roadmap

This issue tracks the status of six active milestones for AgentDeck.

## Milestones

### 0.1.x Bootstrap MVP

Project foundation, domain contract, workbench shell, and basic services.

### 0.2.x Agent Runtime and MCP

Agent runtime, workers, subagents, memory service, and MCP integration.

### 0.3.x Extension Host and compatibility

Extension host, VSIX installer, and VS Code API compatibility.

### 1.0 Stabilize MVP

Final stabilization, hardening, and MVP readiness.
